description_long: This house features a low, sprawling profile with a complex hip roof covered in dark gray shingles. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, likely stucco or painted concrete, with a contrasting darker base trim. The front facade includes a central entryway with a small set of steps, flanked by large windows and a decorative panel or mural on one side. The windows are arranged in a regular pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The property sits on a rectangular plot with a neatly maintained green lawn and a paved entry area. The overall design is simple yet elegant, with a focus on symmetry and clean lines.
description: A single-story house with a complex hip roof, light-colored walls, and a symmetrical facade featuring large windows and a central entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, steps, and decorative panels on the right side.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the extended hip roof and plain wall with minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the symmetrical window arrangement and the continuous hip roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a plain wall, visible roof overhang, and part of the entry steps.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with steps, small porch, and overhanging roof
